meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template: Accelerate SaaS Dev for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop wasting hours on boilerplate. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship high-quality client SaaS apps 10x faster.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development, integrate the Antigravity project template with Claude Code. By standardizing your architectural foundation and automating boilerplate generation via AI, you move from manual configuration to feature implementation in minutes. This stack ensures professional code quality, modular scalability, and predictable delivery timelines for every client project.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking on your sprint, but you are still buried in folder structures, authentication middleware, and database schema migrations. For the modern freelancer, every hour spent on boilerplate is an hour stolen from high-value feature development—and your profit margins. The industry standard has shifted; if you are still building from scratch, you are already behind.

Antigravity is the antidote to the 'blank page' syndrome. By leveraging a battle-tested project template paired with the reasoning power of Claude Code, you stop acting like a configuration engineer and start performing like a product architect. It is time to reclaim your velocity and deliver enterprise-grade results without the manual overhead.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Establish the core project structure to ensure type safety and folder hierarchy are pre-configured.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity production-ready template. Include Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and standard authentication hooks.

steps.title: Define Schema via Natural Language
steps.description: Use Claude Code to translate business requirements into Prisma or Drizzle schemas within the template.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a database schema for a SaaS subscription model including User, Subscription, and Project entities with proper relational mapping.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'generate prisma schema for user-subscription model'

steps.title: Component Library Injection
steps.description: Rapidly scaffold UI components using the template's built-in design system to maintain consistency.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive dashboard landing page using the Antigravity UI component library and Lucide icons.

steps.title: Middleware and Auth Integration
steps.description: Configure secure route protection and session management automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Setup middleware to protect /api and /dashboard routes, ensuring only authenticated users can access them.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement auth middleware for routes'

steps.title: Automated Testing Suite
steps.description: Generate integration tests for your newly created endpoints to ensure reliability before deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write Playwright tests for the user authentication flow and subscription purchase journey.

pro_tips: Always use a custom .claudeignore file to prevent the AI from indexing massive node_modules or build artifacts, significantly increasing response speed.
Force the AI to follow your specific coding style by providing a 'style-guide.md' in the root directory before running any generation commands.
Use Claude Code's 'review' feature on your own manual commits to find edge-case bugs before they hit production.
Leverage the Antigravity template's pre-configured CI/CD pipeline to automate deployments to Vercel or Railway on every push.
Keep your prompts modular; instead of asking for an entire app, ask for one service at a time to maintain high token accuracy and logical separation.
content.next_steps: Deploy your initial skeleton to a preview environment, run a performance audit, and begin iterating on your core business logic.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the boilerplate and start shipping the features your clients actually pay for. By mastering the Antigravity and Claude Code workflow, you transform your freelance career into a high-velocity development machine. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
